examples.title: Static Data Member Declaration and Definition
examples.description: Shows correct syntax for declaring and defining static data members
examples.explanation: Static members are declared inside class but must be defined exactly once outside. C++11 allows in-class initialization for static const integral types.

examples.title: Static Member Function
examples.description: Demonstrates static member function usage and restrictions
examples.explanation: Static member functions can only access static members directly. They cannot use 'this' pointer or access non-static members without an object.

examples.title: Object Counter Implementation
examples.description: Complete program to count objects using static member
examples.explanation: Static member tracks object count across all instances. Constructor increments, destructor decrements. Objects going out of scope are destroyed.

examples.title: Static Local Variable
examples.description: Demonstrates static local variable behavior in functions
examples.explanation: Static local variables retain their value between function calls while normal local variables are reinitialized each call.
